name: eds/figma-map
description: Map a Figma design section to a local EDS block. Fetches design data via the Figma MCP, maps styles to CSS tokens, creates a figma-audit.md, updates the block SCSS with token usage and gap candidates, and produces an analysis report.
when_to_use: when a developer wants to audit a Figma design node against a block's CSS token usage, or when starting block implementation from a Figma spec
